meta.title: Ved Umrajkar | Resume
meta.description: Resume of Ved Umrajkar, a student of Mathematics and Computing at IIT Roorkee.

hero.name: Ved Umrajkar
paragraphs: Final-year BS-MS student in **Mathematics and Computing** at IIT Roorkee, focused on trustworthy machine learning, computer vision, and applied statistics for real-world systems.

Experience across macro-fee forecasting at JPMorgan Chase, risk analytics on Starknet at Hashstack Finance, and agentic evidence selection research at PavoAI — with papers at ICLR 2025, ICCV 2025, and KDD 2026.

timeline.title: IIT Roorkee
timeline.subtitle: BS-MS, Mathematics & Computing
timeline.description: Enrolled in the 5-year integrated program. CGPA 8.605. Specialised in ML, Financial Risk, and Statistical Inference.

timeline.title: Data Science Group, IIT Roorkee
timeline.subtitle: Joint Secretary
timeline.description: Mentored students in ML, coordinated campus projects and workshops, and hosted a supervised-learning hackathon on the UCI Gesture Phase Segmentation dataset.

timeline.title: Hashstack Finance
timeline.subtitle: Data Scientist
timeline.description: Built a Starknet risk dashboard, boosted anomaly coverage by 15% with a mean-variance optimiser, and shipped automated growth alerts. Aug 2023 – Feb 2024.

timeline.title: Inter-IIT Tech Meet 13.0
timeline.subtitle: Silver Medal · IIT Bombay
timeline.description: Silver medal building an AI-powered product for Dream11. Also placed 16th in Amazon ML Challenge 2024 (10,000+ candidates) and qualified for Citadel's India Terminal Coding competition.

timeline.title: Tree Ring Watermarks
timeline.subtitle: ICLR 2025 Workshop Paper
timeline.description: Benchmarked Tree Ring watermark detectability on DDIM vs rectified flow transformers (FLUX.1-dev); diagnosed inversion instability and proposed robust recovery settings for text-to-image safety pipelines.

timeline.title: ICLR 2025
timeline.subtitle: Singapore · Conference
timeline.description: Attended the International Conference on Learning Representations. Presented Tree Ring watermark workshop paper at Singapore Expo.

timeline.title: JPMorgan Chase
timeline.subtitle: Software Engineering Intern · Bengaluru
timeline.description: Productionised a macroeconomic-indicator-driven investment management fees forecasting model and built COVID-aware headcount sensitivity prototypes for Asset & Wealth Management. May – Jul 2025.

timeline.title: DAC-LoRA
timeline.subtitle: ICCV 2025 — Workshop on Safe Multimodal AI
timeline.description: Dynamic Adversarial Curriculum for LoRA-based VLM fine-tuning, outperforming vanilla LoRA and single-stage adversarial training on few-shot benchmarks.

timeline.title: PavoAI
timeline.subtitle: Research Intern · Remote
timeline.description: Co-authored 'Agentic Evidence Selection for Decision-Making under Cognitive Constraints' (KDD 2026 Research Track); formalised task-agnostic evidence selection as constrained submodular optimisation achieving 95.4% of theoretical maximum semantic coverage.
